Welcome to bythzkel sombrГ©a, this little inde game will allow you to discover the game in 1rd person view by controlling a lone soldier who will have to eliminate the zombies affecting not an ancient mithic creature which has effect the astec population then your role is to kill until the last one in eleminant without getting killed.

About the game

The game presents itself as a first-person survival game that you must face infested and mythical creatures for this purpose in order to have the totality of the character you control appears like this:

1: wasd or zqsd to move

2: mouse wheel yo switch weapon

3: left click to aim.

little information above, be careful this game is in the beta alpha phase it is being built if you have to kill to finish the game without dying or if you want to have fun the game has no time has limits, the game includes certain things uncensored if you like brutality this game is made for you.

Interesting little story,

I created this game for the purpose of reflection and concerted handling of this game and developed by a very limited game engine because I will not be able to make a small modification to limit it so as not to disturb its gameplay system blocked by a system where I cannot go further in my creation will remain free it will not change at its price which is visible to everyone it will remain free on all players who want to test it and give constructive opinions to go further.

Discover the little story of Bythzkel where you are the protagonist magician you must eliminate the zombie and the demon who reside in these places be careful not to die you must look for two chests hide on the map have as much fun as possible in this demo.
